summary: Comprehensive testing of Suppliers Tab (Proveedores) optimization features. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified via Playwright testing.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns list of suppliers
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/with-active-orders returns suppliers with active_orders count field
Backend: POST /api/suppliers with category field (licores, tabaco, alimentos, general) works
Backend: Supplier without category defaults to 'general'
Backend: PUT /api/suppliers/{id} updates category successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/suppliers/{id} removes supplier
Backend: All 4 category options (licores, tabaco, alimentos, general) work correctly
Backend: Suppliers have searchable fields (name, contact_name, rnc)
Frontend: Login with PIN 0000 via keypad works
Frontend: Navigation to /inventory-manager loads correctly
Frontend: Proveedores tab accessible and loads SuppliersTab component
Frontend: data-testid='suppliers-tab' present
Frontend: Search input (data-testid='supplier-search-input') present with placeholder 'Buscar por nombre, contacto o RNC...'
Frontend: Category filter buttons present (Todos, Licores, Tabaco, Alimentos, Generales)
Frontend: data-testid='filter-all', 'filter-licores', 'filter-tabaco', 'filter-alimentos', 'filter-general' all present
Frontend: '+ Nuevo Proveedor' button (data-testid='add-supplier-btn') present and positioned on right
Frontend: Stats badge shows 'X de Y proveedores' count correctly
Frontend: Search by name filters suppliers (tested with 'Nacional')
Frontend: Search by RNC filters suppliers (tested with '101-00001')
Frontend: Category filter (Licores) updates results and stats badge
Frontend: Click on supplier name opens edit dialog
Frontend: Edit dialog shows all 4 category selector buttons
Frontend: Category selector buttons have data-testid='category-select-{cat}'
Frontend: Save button (data-testid='save-supplier-btn') present in dialog
Frontend: Create new supplier with Tabaco category works
Frontend: Category badge (Tabaco) displays correctly for new supplier
Frontend: Delete supplier works with confirmation dialog
Integration: active_orders count correctly calculated from draft/sent/partial POs
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Proveedor Playwright supplier during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suppliers Tab (Proveedores) fully tested. All features working: multi-criteria search (name, contact, RNC), category filters (Todos, Licores, Tabaco, Alimentos, Generales), stats badge, click-to-edit, category selector in dialog, active orders badge. Backend endpoint /api/suppliers/with-active-orders correctly aggregates PO counts. Current suppliers all have 'general' category (no existing licores/tabaco/alimentos suppliers yet). Minor accessibility warning about missing DialogContent description.
